description: Biblical Hebrew vowel, pronunciation, punctuation, and cantillation marks observed in the corpus.

marks.name: Etnahta
marks.description: Major cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Segol accent
marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Shalshelet
marks.description: Rare cantillation accent with a distinctive melodic pattern.

marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Geresh muqdam
marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Gershayim
marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Qarney para
marks.description: Rare cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Telisha gedola
marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Pazer
marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Merkha
marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Merkha kefula
marks.description: Rare cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Darga
marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Qadma
marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Telisha qetana
marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Yerah ben yomo
marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Ole
marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Iluy
marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Dehi
marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Zinor
marks.description: Cantillation accent; marks chanting and syntactic division.

marks.name: Sheva
marks.description: Vowel mark for a very short vowel or silence, depending on context.

marks.name: Hataf segol
marks.description: Reduced e-class vowel.

marks.name: Hataf patah
marks.description: Reduced a-class vowel.

marks.name: Hataf qamats
marks.description: Reduced o-class vowel.

marks.name: Hiriq
marks.description: I-class vowel mark.

marks.name: Tsere
marks.description: E-class vowel mark.

marks.name: Segol
marks.description: Short e-class vowel mark.

marks.name: Patah
marks.description: A-class vowel mark.

marks.name: Qamats
marks.description: A/o-class vowel mark; exact sound depends on form and context.

marks.name: Holam
marks.description: O-class vowel mark.

marks.name: Holam haser for vav
marks.description: Holam mark used with vav in pointed text.

marks.name: Qubuts
marks.description: U-class vowel mark.

marks.name: Dagesh or mappiq
marks.description: Dot that can harden a consonant, double it, or mark final he as consonantal.

marks.name: Meteg
marks.description: Vertical mark often used for secondary stress or vowel clarity.

marks.name: Maqaf
marks.description: Hebrew hyphen joining words into a close reading unit.

marks.name: Rafe
marks.description: Mark indicating a softened consonant in some traditions.

marks.name: Paseq
marks.description: Divider mark used to separate words or accents.

marks.name: Shin dot
marks.description: Right-side dot indicating shin pronunciation.

marks.name: Sin dot
marks.description: Left-side dot indicating sin pronunciation.

marks.name: Sof pasuq
marks.description: Verse-ending punctuation mark.

marks.name: Upper dot
marks.description: Masoretic upper dot used as a special textual mark.

marks.name: Lower dot
marks.description: Masoretic lower dot used as a special textual mark.

marks.name: Qamats qatan
marks.description: O-class qamats form distinguished in some pointed editions.
